description: File name of the image (e.g. IMG_3428.JPG)
Calibration quality: 'good' (R2>0.85, dE_after<8), 'acceptable' (R2>0.70, dE_after<10), or 'poor'. Blank if status is not 'calibrated'
Image rotation at which the ColorChecker card was detected (0, 90CW, 180, 90CCW).
Detected grid orientation and flip used for the best fit (e.g. 4x6, 6x4_flipLR)
Number of ColorChecker patches used in the correction fit
Slope of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB lightness channel
Intercept of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB lightness channel
R-squared of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB lightness channel
Slope of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB a* (green – red) channel
Intercept of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB a* (green – red) channel
R-squared of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB a* (green – red) channel
Slope of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB b* (blue – yellow) channel
Intercept of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB b* (blue – yellow) channel
R-squared of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB b* (blue – yellow) channel
Mean ΔE between detected and reference patch Lab values before correction
Mean ΔE between corrected and reference patch Lab values, after correction. Values above 10 force a 'poor' quality label regardless of R2
Free-text note, e.g. 'use day-level fallback' when no checker card was found.
